platform.title: Platform Console
platform.subtitle: View and manage all organizations on the platform
platform.impersonation_banner: You are viewing {{org}} as a platform admin
platform.org_name_helper: Enter a clear organization name you can recognize later.
platform.manage_org_description: Administrative actions are kept here so the org card stays focused on entering the workspace.
platform.enter_description: Switch into this organization and continue in the main workspace.
platform.delete_hint: Deleting an organization permanently removes it and all of its data. Use this only for cleanup or mistakes.
platform.delete_confirm: Delete "{{name}}" and all of its data? This cannot be undone.
platform.delete_last_org: Cannot delete the last organization on the platform
